The Forgotten Ways

Reactivating apostolic genius — the missional DNA that fueled the early church and the underground Chinese movement.

2006 · 288 pages Read more →
Article 8 min read · Mar 2024

Why movements stall — and what reignites them

When the structures designed to sustain a movement begin to calcify, the very thing that gave it life becomes the thing that limits it.

Leadership · Movements Read →

Video Keynote · 2023

Apostolic genius in the 21st century

A keynote exploring how the fivefold gifting described in Ephesians 4 can reshape institutional leadership today.

5Q: Reactivating the Original Intelligence

A full theological and organizational framework for recovering all five callings of Ephesians 4 in every level of the church.

The priesthood of all believers — and what we lost
